summary: Aligned the shell headline and breadcrumb for project record routes so project detail pages stop inheriting the list-scene title.
verification: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck:strict'
